name: Double Cabbage Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the cider vinegar, honey-mustard, golden brown sugar, celery seeds, pepper, and salt until well combined.
2. Add the mayonnaise and sour cream or plain yogurt to the mixture. Stir until smooth.
3. Add the shredded green and red cabbage, chopped green onions, and dried currants to the dressing. Toss everything together in a large bowl until evenly coated.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours to allow the flavors to meld and the coleslaw to chill.
